test.command: cd C:\exp\puzzle-solver && uv run pytest tests/ -v

lint.command: cd C:\exp\puzzle-solver && uv run ruff check src tests

blockingIssues.description: src/ui/state.py still defaults AppState() to JsonRepository unless a SQLiteStore is passed explicitly, so the default runtime path is not SQLite-backed as required.

The recorded handoff commit af986af64f641718eb512a7ab05d182ac49858e3 does not contain the claimed runtime-backend implementation or related regression tests, so the feature cannot be validated against its recorded commit.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the Windows-safe path/invocation for the mission init script as .factory\init.sh to avoid workers trying .\factory\init.sh and failing on Windows path handling.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The reviewed feature handoff reported an initial Windows path mismatch for the init script before switching to .factory\init.sh.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require feature handoff commitId values to reference the actual implementation commit being reviewed, not a later validation-only commit.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of make-sqlite-default-runtime-backend found its handoff commit points to af986af64f641718eb512a7ab05d182ac49858e3, whose diff contains only validation artifacts and uv.lock rather than the claimed AppState/runtime backend changes.
